info.title: Showpad REST API
info.description:
The Showpad REST API provides programmatic access to the Showpad content enablement platform. It allows developers to manage users, assets, divisions, tags, channels, user groups, content profiles, experiences, shares, and webhooks.

Capabilities include:
- User management - Create, update, retrieve, and delete users and user groups
- Content management - Upload, organize, and manage assets and content profiles
- Division management - Organize content and users into divisions
- Tagging - Categorize and organize content with tags
- Channels - Distribute content through channels
- Experiences - Manage interactive content experiences
- Shares - Generate shareable links with tracking
- Webhooks - Receive real-time notifications of events

Showpad supports two API versions (v3 and v4) that can be used in hybrid mode. This spec covers the v3 API, which is the most complete version. Authentication is handled via OAuth 2.0 or personal API tokens passed as Bearer tokens.

tags.name: Users
tags.description: Manage users including creation, updates, retrieval, and deletion. Supports integration with external user directories.

tags.name: UserGroups
tags.description: Manage user groups for organizing users and controlling access permissions.

tags.name: Assets
tags.description: Manage content assets including uploading, metadata management, and organization within the content library.

tags.name: Divisions
tags.description: Manage organizational divisions to structure content and user access.

tags.name: Tags
tags.description: Manage tags for categorizing and organizing content assets.

tags.name: Channels
tags.description: Manage content distribution channels for organizing and delivering content to users.

tags.name: ContentProfiles
tags.description: Manage content profiles that define how content is displayed and organized.

tags.name: Experiences
tags.description: Manage interactive content experiences for engaging buyer interactions.

tags.name: Shares
tags.description: Generate and manage shareable links with configurable access permissions and activity tracking.

tags.name: Tickets
tags.description: Track asset processing operations and their status.

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description: Manage webhook subscriptions for receiving real-time event notifications.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of users in the Showpad organization.

200.description: Successful response with a list of users.

post.description: Create a new user in the Showpad organization. Requires API v3.

get.description: Retrieve a single user by their unique identifier.

200.description: Successful response with user details.

put.description: Update an existing user. Only provide the attributes that need to be updated. Requires API v3.

200.description: User updated successfully.

delete.description: Delete a user from the Showpad organization.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of user groups.

200.description: Successful response with a list of user groups.

get.description: Retrieve a single user group by its identifier.

200.description: Successful response with user group details.
User group updated successfully.

get.summary: List users in a user group
get.description: Retrieve all users belonging to a specific user group.

200.description: Successful response with a list of users in the group.

post.summary: Add users to a user group
post.description: Add one or more users to a user group.

200.description: Users added to the group successfully.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of assets in the content library.

200.description: Successful response with a list of assets.

post.description: Create a new asset in the content library. In API v3, asset creation returns a ticket ID for tracking the processing status.

201.description: Asset creation initiated. Returns a ticket ID for polling the processing status.

get.description: Retrieve a single asset by its unique identifier.

200.description: Successful response with asset details.

put.description: Update the metadata of an existing asset.

200.description: Asset updated successfully.

delete.description: Delete an asset from the content library.

get.description: Retrieve all tags associated with a specific asset.

200.description: Successful response with a list of tags.

post.description: Associate one or more tags with an asset.

200.description: Tags added to the asset successfully.

get.description: Retrieve all channels an asset is published to.

200.description: Successful response with a list of channels.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of divisions.

200.description: Successful response with a list of divisions.

get.description: Retrieve a single division by its identifier.

200.description: Successful response with division details.
Division updated successfully.

get.description: Retrieve all assets belonging to a specific division.

200.description: Successful response with a list of assets in the division.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of tags.

200.description: Successful response with a list of tags.

post.description: Create a new tag for content categorization.

get.description: Retrieve a single tag by its identifier.

200.description: Successful response with tag details.
Tag updated successfully.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of channels.

200.description: Successful response with a list of channels.

post.description: Create a new content distribution channel.

get.description: Retrieve a single channel by its identifier.

200.description: Successful response with channel details.
Channel updated successfully.

get.description: Retrieve all assets published to a specific channel.

200.description: Successful response with a list of assets in the channel.

post.description: Publish one or more assets to a channel.

200.description: Assets added to the channel successfully.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of content profiles.

200.description: Successful response with a list of content profiles.

get.description: Retrieve a single content profile by its identifier.

200.description: Successful response with content profile details.
Content profile updated successfully.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of experiences.

200.description: Successful response with a list of experiences.

post.description: Create a new interactive content experience.

get.description: Retrieve a single experience by its identifier.

200.description: Successful response with experience details.
Experience updated successfully.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of shares.

200.description: Successful response with a list of shares.

post.description: Generate a shareable link with configurable access permissions, themes, and activity tracking.

get.description: Retrieve a single share by its identifier.

200.description: Successful response with share details.

delete.description: Delete a share and revoke its shareable link.

get.description: Retrieve the status of an asset processing ticket. Used to poll the processing status after creating an asset in API v3.

200.description: Successful response with ticket status.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of webhook subscriptions.

200.description: Successful response with a list of webhooks.

post.description: Create a new webhook subscription to receive real-time notifications of events.

get.description: Retrieve a single webhook subscription by its identifier.

200.description: Successful response with webhook details.
Webhook updated successfully.

oauth2.description: OAuth 2.0 authentication for accessing Showpad data on behalf of users. Register an OAuth2 client in the Showpad Admin App to obtain a Client ID and Secret. The Authorization Code flow is recommended for integrations.

scopes.refresh_token: Allows automatic refresh of access tokens
scopes.read_user_management: Read access to user data including users, user groups, and permissions
scopes.write_user_management: Write access to user data including users, user groups, and permissions
scopes.read_contentprofile_management: Read access to content profiles and assets
scopes.write_contentprofile_management: Write access to content profiles and assets
scopes.appsdb_online_integrations: Access to AppsDB for online integrations

bearerToken.description: Personal API token authentication. Generate a token from the Admin App under Settings > API Tokens. The token is passed as a Bearer token in the Authorization header. Requires Ultimate, Advanced, or Expert plan with Administrator access.

limit.name: limit
limit.description: Limits the number of retrieved resources.

offset.name: offset
offset.description: Offsets the retrieved resources. An offset of 3 skips the first three results.

fields.name: fields
fields.description: A comma-separated list of attributes to return in the response. Use to retrieve only specific fields and reduce response size.

userId.name: userId
userId.description: The unique identifier of the user.

userGroupId.name: userGroupId
userGroupId.description: The unique identifier of the user group.

assetId.name: assetId
assetId.description: The unique identifier of the asset.

divisionId.name: divisionId
divisionId.description: The unique identifier of the division.

tagId.name: tagId
tagId.description: The unique identifier of the tag.

channelId.name: channelId
channelId.description: The unique identifier of the channel.

contentProfileId.name: contentProfileId
contentProfileId.description: The unique identifier of the content profile.

experienceId.name: experienceId
experienceId.description: The unique identifier of the experience.

shareId.name: shareId
shareId.description: The unique identifier of the share.

ticketId.name: ticketId
ticketId.description: The unique identifier of the ticket.

webhookId.name: webhookId
webhookId.description: The unique identifier of the webhook.

BadRequest.description: Bad request - The request body or parameters are invalid.

Unauthorized.description: Unauthorized - Authentication credentials are missing or invalid.

Forbidden.description: Forbidden - Insufficient permissions to access this resource.

NotFound.description: Not found - The requested resource does not exist.

TooManyRequests.description: Too many requests - Rate limit exceeded.

ErrorResponse.description: Standard error response from the Showpad API.

count.description: Total number of items matching the query.

limit.description: Maximum number of items returned per page.

externalId.description: External identifier for linking the user to an external directory (e.g., for SAML authentication).

isActive.description: Whether the user account is active.

language.description: Preferred language for the user (ISO 639-1 code).

role.description: The user's role within the Showpad organization.

division.description: The division the user belongs to.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user was last updated.

CreateUserRequest.description: Request body for creating a new user.

externalId.description: External identifier for linking the user to an external directory.

isActive.description: Whether the user account should be active.

language.description: Preferred language for the user (ISO 639-1 code).

UpdateUserRequest.description: Request body for updating a user. Only include attributes that need to change.

externalId.description: External identifier for linking the user to an external directory.

isActive.description: Whether the user account is active.

language.description: Preferred language for the user (ISO 639-1 code).

UserListResponse.description: Response containing a paginated list of users.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user group.

externalId.description: External identifier for the user group.

userCount.description: Number of users in the group.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the group was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the group was last updated.

CreateUserGroupRequest.description: Request body for creating a user group.

externalId.description: External identifier for the user group.

UpdateUserGroupRequest.description: Request body for updating a user group.

externalId.description: External identifier for the user group.

UserGroupResponse.description: Response containing a single user group.

UserGroupListResponse.description: Response containing a paginated list of user groups.

UserGroupUsersRequest.description: Request body for adding users to a user group.

userIds.description: List of user IDs to add to the group.

fileType.description: MIME type of the asset file.

fileSize.description: Size of the asset file in bytes.

isShareable.description: Whether the asset can be shared externally.

isAnnotatable.description: Whether annotations are enabled for the asset.

isDownloadable.description: Whether the asset can be downloaded.

isSensitive.description: Whether the asset contains sensitive content.

division.description: The division the asset belongs to.

channels.description: Channels the asset is published to.

locale.description: Locale of the asset content (e.g., en-US).

thumbnailUrl.description: URL to the asset thumbnail image.

originalUrl.description: URL to the original asset file.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the asset was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the asset was last updated.

CreateAssetRequest.description: Request body for creating a new asset. Uses multipart/form-data for file upload.

divisionId.description: ID of the division to assign the asset to.

isShareable.description: Whether the asset can be shared externally.

isDownloadable.description: Whether the asset can be downloaded.

UpdateAssetRequest.description: Request body for updating an asset's metadata.

isShareable.description: Whether the asset can be shared externally.

isDownloadable.description: Whether the asset can be downloaded.

isSensitive.description: Whether the asset contains sensitive content.

AssetCreationResponse.description: Response returned after initiating asset creation. Contains a ticket ID for tracking processing status.

ticketId.description: Ticket ID for polling the asset processing status.

AssetListResponse.description: Response containing a paginated list of assets.

AssetTagsRequest.description: Request body for adding tags to an asset.

tagIds.description: List of tag IDs to associate with the asset.

isDefault.description: Whether this is the default division.

assetCount.description: Number of assets in the division.

userCount.description: Number of users in the division.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the division was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the division was last updated.

CreateDivisionRequest.description: Request body for creating a division.

UpdateDivisionRequest.description: Request body for updating a division.

DivisionListResponse.description: Response containing a paginated list of divisions.

Tag.description: A Showpad tag for content categorization.

category.description: Tag category this tag belongs to.

assetCount.description: Number of assets tagged with this tag.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the tag was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the tag was last updated.

CreateTagRequest.description: Request body for creating a tag.

categoryId.description: ID of the tag category to assign the tag to.

UpdateTagRequest.description: Request body for updating a tag.

TagListResponse.description: Response containing a paginated list of tags.

assetCount.description: Number of assets published to the channel.

division.description: The division the channel belongs to.

isPublished.description: Whether the channel is currently published and visible.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the channel was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the channel was last updated.

CreateChannelRequest.description: Request body for creating a channel.

divisionId.description: ID of the division to assign the channel to.

UpdateChannelRequest.description: Request body for updating a channel.

ChannelListResponse.description: Response containing a paginated list of channels.

ChannelAssetsRequest.description: Request body for adding assets to a channel.

assetIds.description: List of asset IDs to publish to the channel.

ContentProfile.description: A Showpad content profile defining how content is displayed and organized.

id.description: Unique identifier for the content profile.

externalId.description: External identifier for the content profile.

division.description: The division the content profile belongs to.

isDefault.description: Whether this is the default content profile.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the content profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the content profile was last updated.

CreateContentProfileRequest.description: Request body for creating a content profile.

externalId.description: External identifier for the content profile.

divisionId.description: ID of the division for the content profile.

UpdateContentProfileRequest.description: Request body for updating a content profile.

externalId.description: External identifier for the content profile.

ContentProfileResponse.description: Response containing a single content profile.

ContentProfileListResponse.description: Response containing a paginated list of content profiles.

division.description: The division the experience belongs to.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the experience was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the experience was last updated.

CreateExperienceRequest.description: Request body for creating an experience.

divisionId.description: ID of the division for the experience.

UpdateExperienceRequest.description: Request body for updating an experience.

ExperienceListResponse.description: Response containing a paginated list of experiences.

Share.description: A Showpad share with a tracked or untracked shareable link.

isTracked.description: Whether activity on the share is tracked.

isPasswordProtected.description: Whether the share is password protected.

expiresAt.description: Expiration date for the shareable link.

viewCount.description: Number of times the share has been viewed.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the share was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the share was last updated.

CreateShareRequest.description: Request body for creating a share.

assetIds.description: List of asset IDs to include in the share.

isTracked.description: Whether to track activity on the share.

expiresAt.description: Expiration date for the shareable link.

recipients.description: Recipients to send the share to.

ShareListResponse.description: Response containing a paginated list of shares.

Ticket.description: A processing ticket for tracking asset upload status.

assetId.description: ID of the asset being processed.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the ticket was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the ticket was last updated.

Webhook.description: A webhook subscription for receiving event notifications.

url.description: The URL to send webhook payloads to.

events.description: List of event types this webhook subscribes to (e.g., asset.created, user.updated).

secret.description: Secret used to sign webhook payloads for verification.

isActive.description: Whether the webhook is currently active.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the webhook was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the webhook was last updated.

CreateWebhookRequest.description: Request body for creating a webhook subscription.

url.description: The URL to send webhook payloads to.

events.description: List of event types to subscribe to (e.g., asset.created, asset.updated, asset.deleted, user.created, user.updated, user.deleted, share.created).

isActive.description: Whether the webhook should be active.

UpdateWebhookRequest.description: Request body for updating a webhook subscription.

url.description: The URL to send webhook payloads to.

events.description: List of event types to subscribe to.

WebhookListResponse.description: Response containing a paginated list of webhooks.
